main.description: Declare a planetary-infrastructure deployment site. Returns siteDid. Synchronously runs the jurisdiction-eligibility DMN (ADR-2605201400 §5) — sites without a stewardship claim (LandRegistry / OceanStewardship / RiverStewardship / AtmosphereStewardship / OrbitalSlot) or that violate Charter Rider §2 are rejected. ADR-2605201400.

geo.description: GeoJSON Feature (Polygon or MultiPolygon for terrestrial / aquatic; Point + altitude for orbital)

jurisdictionDid.description: DID of the stewardship registry entry covering this site

intendedUse.description: Free-form intended-use statement; gated against Charter Rider §2(a-h)

intendedBeneficiaryDids.description: Community DIDs that will benefit from the deployment

localLawAttestationCid.description: IPFS CID — Steward Lv5+ attestation of local-law compliance (required for restricted utilities: electric / gas / airplane / network-spectrum / orbit)
